MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Edward O. Lee, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Grancare, LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness Fe Romano was placed under oath and direct examined.
No other appearance.
After hearing the testimony, considering of the evidence presented, the court took the matter under submission for cousel to submit more doc. in support of the judgment request. (due date of 09-29-11)

10-25-11
Judgment granted in the total amount of $13,030.45 signed by Judge Chaitin (see scanned doc)
